original_snippet_context: Analysis of the recent drop in exchange rates and its impact, with criticism of those manipulating the market.
relevant_quote: A Caixa de Conversão, com o seu habil projecto de politica nova, interrompeu o curso habitual das taxas de cambio e resolveu fixar o cambio em taes termos que ninguem quizesse ou pudesse vender a descoberto saques para datas distantes.
justification: The author criticizes the Caixa de Conversão for disrupting exchange rate stability and creating an environment that discourages selling saques (drafts/bills of exchange) "a descoberto" (uncovered/short), suggesting a negative view of its intervention in the market. This aligns with some orthodox concerns about market manipulation and potential negative consequences of the Caixa.
